name: worktree
approvalPolicy: Ask before irreversible operations or before proceeding past non-trivial spec/cleanup/deploy gates.
verification: Every worktree has owner and merge target
No overlapping file ownership remains unresolved
stopRules: Stop on destructive operation without approval.
Stop when required evidence cannot be produced.
toolPolicy: Use existing user/project tools and preferences; do not require bundled tool-wrapper skills.
